name: print
description: Prints the specified message or variable to the console.

name: for loop
description: Executes a sequence of statements multiple times (one for each item in a collection).

name: if statement
description: Executes a block of code if a specified condition is true.

name: list comprehension
description: A concise way to create lists based on existing lists with an optional condition.
code: [x**2 for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0]

name: function
description: Defines a reusable block of code that can be called with specific parameters.

name: dictionary
description: A collection of key-value pairs, where keys are unique.

name: lambda function
description: A small anonymous function defined with lambda, often used for short operations.

name: try-except
description: Handles exceptions that may occur in a block of code.

name: class
description: Defines a blueprint for creating objects, encapsulating data and behaviors.

name: import module
description: Imports a module to access its functions and variables.
